name: fairsplit
description: TypeScript expense-sharing app with email/password auth and all features unlocked.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @fairsplit/core && npm run build --workspace @fairsplit/server && npm run build --workspace @fairsplit/web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.build:vercel: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace @fairsplit/core && npm run build --workspace @fairsplit/server && npm run build --workspace @fairsplit/web && npm run routes:smoke
